panels.title: Up
panels.description: 正常实例数

panels.title: Uptime
panels.description: 启用时长

panels.title: Memory
panels.description: 内存占用（MiB）

panels.title: Page Faults
panels.description: 页缺失中断次数 Page faults indicate that requests are processed from disk either because an index is missing or there is not enough memory for the data set. Consider increasing memory or sharding out.

panels.title: Network I/O
panels.description: 网络流量（byte）

panels.title: Connections
panels.description: 连接数 Keep in mind the hard limit on the maximum number of connections set by your distribution.

panels.title: Assert Events
panels.description: 断言错误次数 Asserts are not important by themselves, but you can correlate spikes with other graphs.

panels.title: Lock Queue
panels.description: 等待获取锁操作数量 Any number of queued operations for long periods of time is an indication of possible issues. Find the cause and fix it before requests get stuck in the queue.

panels.title: Command Operations
panels.description: 接收请求数 Shows how many times a command is executed per second on average during the selected interval.

panels.title: Document Operations
panels.description: 文档操作数 When used in combination with 'Command Operations', this graph can help identify write amplification. For example, when one insert or update command actually inserts or updates hundreds, thousands, or even millions of documents.

panels.title: Response Time
panels.description: 操作详情耗时（毫秒）

panels.title: Query Efficiency
panels.description: 查询效率

panels.title: Cursors
panels.description: 游标数量 Helps identify why connections are increasing. Shows active cursors compared to cursors being automatically killed after 10 minutes due to an application not closing the connection.

panels.title: Cache Size
panels.description: 缓存大小（byte）

panels.title: Cache I/O
panels.description: 写入或读取的缓存数据大小（byte）

panels.title: Cache Dirty Pages Rate
panels.description: 缓存脏页占比

panels.title: Cache Evicted Pages
panels.description: 缓存剔除页数量

panels.title: Replset Election
panels.description: 副本集选主时间

panels.title: Replset Lag Seconds
panels.description: 副本集成员主从同步延迟

panels.title: Replset Member State
panels.description: 当前实例在副本集中的状态，1 表示 Primary，2 表示 Secondary。

panels.title: Replset Member Health
panels.description: 副本集成员健康状态，1 表示健康。

panels.title: Oplog Window
panels.description: oplog 可保留的时间窗口，窗口太小会放大 Secondary 追不上后全量同步的风险。

panels.title: Oplog Used Bytes
panels.description: oplog 当前大小和最大容量。

panels.title: Database Size
panels.description: 库级数据、索引和存储占用。

panels.title: Collections / Indexes
panels.description: 库级集合数和索引数，用于发现异常膨胀。

panels.title: Index Access Rate
panels.description: 索引访问速率 Top 10，用于识别热点集合和索引。

panels.title: WiredTiger Tickets Available
panels.description: WiredTiger 读写并发 ticket 可用数量，持续过低表示读写并发压力较高。

panels.title: WiredTiger Tickets Out
panels.description: WiredTiger 正在占用的读写 ticket 数量。

panels.title: WiredTiger Checkpoint Time
panels.description: WiredTiger checkpoint 耗时增量，异常升高通常与磁盘写入压力相关。

panels.title: Shard / Collection Counts
panels.description: mongos 视角下的 shard、库和分片集合数量。

panels.title: Chunk Distribution
panels.description: 各 shard 的 chunk 分布，用于发现明显不均衡。

panels.title: Balancer Status
panels.description: Balancer 是否启用、chunk 是否均衡以及是否存在 draining shard。

panels.title: Total Chunks
panels.description: mongos 视角下的分片集群总 chunk 数。
